title: Attendance Clock Toggle Command
description: Imperative request to toggle a worker's clock state on a target timekeeping system. Orwell can consume this command and decide whether to clock in or clock out based on current state.

clock_system.description: Target timekeeping integration or system name, for example 'orwell'.

principal.description: Logical worker or account identifier whose clock state should be toggled.

reason.description: Optional operator-visible reason for the toggle request.

requested_at.description: Optional caller timestamp representing when the toggle was requested.
